feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: This board is full of basement dwellers trying to make excuses for why they don'…
entry.content: This board is full of basement dwellers trying to make excuses for why they don't get off their lazy asses and watch Obsession or Odyssey. So they make up all sorts of mental gymnastics for not going and seeing it. They actually believe the director of Obsession was shilling on /tv/. LMAO And now they're gonna keep posting screencaps of Elliot and Lupita to convince themselves, see. I did the right thing. Why are you here? You don't watch movies or tv. You're just here to complain.
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Who can save us from the machinations of....the Mongoose?
entry.content: Who can save us from the machinations of....the Mongoose?
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /int/ International: Korean YouTuber Apologizes After Ordering 20 In-Flight Meals During Long-Haul Flight Sparks Backlash
entry.content: >Korean YouTuber Yuno came under fire after uploading a video in which he ordered 20 rounds of in-flight meals and snacks, including seven bowls of instant noodles, during a long-haul flight. >The video showed him repeatedly requesting a wide variety of menu items, including lobster salad, beef stroganoff, bibimbap, beef rice bowls, tiramisu, and other in-flight dishes. >At the end of the video, Yuno thanked the cabin crew, saying, "I spent the whole flight eating, and before I knew it, we'd arr
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >Hires mercenary team to investigate to do a recon mission >One member of the te…
entry.content: >Hires mercenary team to investigate to do a recon mission >One member of the team betrays the others, killing the leader >Years pass >Do nothing to bolster your armed forces to defend yourself against the inevitable venom invasion >Andross is literally at your doorstep >you decide to hire the son of the guy who got killed at the last possible second Seriously what was he thinking? What was he doing in the five year gap between James' death and Fox McCloud fighting the Lylat Wars?
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /int/ International: >yeah we do things a little different here in [state] >the people are so le NICE…
entry.content: >yeah we do things a little different here in [state] >the people are so le NICE, but get this... the drivers are le BAD >and the weather here is CRAZY >sometimes it's LE HOT, but sometimes... it's LE COLD!!!? >and sometimes it's LE RAINY, but sometimes it's... wait for it... LE SUNNY!!!? >and this one part of the state is super liberal, but this other part of the state is, get this, le conservative >and check out this regional phrase we say here >ok, we don't actually say it that often, but it'

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Here is a fun game. This is a photo taken on my s6 edge from 2015/2016. I want y…
entry.content: Here is a fun game. This is a photo taken on my s6 edge from 2015/2016. I want you to take a photo on your phone and then check the resolution of said image.. See if its bigger than this phone. because whats crazy is that my s21, brothers iphone and more ALL take photos at a LOWER resolution than my s6 and can not PHYSICALLY take photos at a higher resolution even when using opencamera

entry.title: /int/ International: In Brazil, it's common to have sex outdoors and it's not taboo
entry.content: In Brazil, it's common for young lovers to be so enamored that they go on hikes through the jungle to secret beaches and have sex along the way and at the beach and inside lagoons etc. While this sex is usually done in less travelled trails only locals know about the rise of all-trails has increased encounters of hiking enthusiasts with these outdoor sexual escapades. Contrary to popular belief, this has not led to a decrease in outdoor sex. It's simply led to new norms surrounding the practice.
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Electro-Punk
entry.content: does anyone here know about the vast array of electropunk bands? i love the shit, currently trying to find a band under the name Button*Masher's releases, but in FLAC form as they're only available in mp3 form as of now, and even have some lost media releases sadly enough. very interesting genre to say the least, love the energy.

entry.title: /b/ Random: Has anybody seen the insane amount of AI videos on social medias? These accounts…
entry.content: Has anybody seen the insane amount of AI videos on social medias? These accounts on TikTok and Instagram have a huge following, they systematically have the same caption like “V stepped in the crowd, taking in live performances at Vogue World[…]”. They also have other bot accounts systematically replying “what is the context of this?” Or “who is this?” To get engagement bait, and it works AI now literally has it’s own network of AI generated content and knows what to post and it for sure knows t
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Unironically I think this is the best looking modern car. I've saved up 50k and …
entry.content: Unironically I think this is the best looking modern car. I've saved up 50k and want to buy the BMW i3 EV as my new daily. Fed up of the running costs of my previous ICE cars, repairs, service, etc. A liter in Germany costs 2 euro. I can charge at home instead. Just wanna know, is it usually a bad idea to buy the first batch of a BMW EV? With previous gens I often read that it's better to buy the facelift model because it eliminated most issues. But given that it's all electric is it still valid
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: There have only been two times in my life when I've ever been high on THC. The f…
entry.content: There have only been two times in my life when I've ever been high on THC. The first time, when I was 14, I had to smoke five joints in a row before I felt anything. Other times, I tried smoking as many as three joints in a row and felt nothing. The high when I was 14 was sort of like everything slowing down drastically, and the thought of "passing out high" kept repeating in my head. On Thursday, almost 20 years later, I got high on THC again, but this was definitely a very different experience
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.content: >Turkey Thursday Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. Previous Thread: https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/84120139/ >Scripts to check image metadata: re
entry.dc:creator: /trash/ Off-Topic

entry.title: /g/ Technology: /g/ appreciation thread
entry.content: To the anon last year that made a thread about useful technology and posted pic related. Thank you. The forest fires are making the air brown outside. Meanwhile inside went from red light to blue light. I didn't even notice smoke indoors until the purifier indicated it Post more times/g/ improved your life
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Josh Sawyer does not like the way Bethesda handles its open world balance
entry.content: >controversial statement I'm going to make... Fallout 3 was not a hard game. Skyrim is also not a hard game. The combat in these games is not super challenging. Skyrim is a game that everybody plays forever, and this is not the only reason, but the fact that it is quite forgiving to the player in terms of scaling is part of it. You can wander the whole map to your heart's content, and with a few exceptions you're probably not gonna die. Same also applies to Fallout 3. >In New Vegas, I was trying
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Black Ops 2
entry.content: Im having more fun with this than any game I have played in the last 5 years or so.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: FINAL FANTASY RESONANCE
entry.content: >https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ft CvnEE6rfI You know they're just making this as an excuse to never make turn-based JRPGs again, right? When this cheap recycle fails to sell 3m on launch day Square Enix is just going to shrug and go back to remakes to see if they can milk a few more dollars out of the dwindling cattle that still pretend their recent games are even passable. You can tell because they are putting zero dollara into marketing it: they WANT this to fail.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: So you're saying everything I've done was in vain?
entry.content: So, I'm gonna perish because I am is a piece of meat? So, I'm not going to be white in another world 'cause I'm a piece of meat and not a soul. So I am Earthbound? I want to be cindered and not be eaten by worms. I don't have courage to kill myself, because it's too scary. No one from the other world helps me kill myself. I hope that I die but I hope that all humanity dies too.
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: In the earliest and most authoritative sources, especially Iliad and later Greek…
entry.content: In the earliest and most authoritative sources, especially Iliad and later Greek literature, Achilles is consistently described with the following attributes: The greatest Greek warrior - unmatched in battle. Swift-footed (podas okus) - his most famous Homeric epithet. Son of a goddess - born to Thetis and the mortal Peleus. Nearly invincible - although the famous "Achilles' heel" story appears in later tradition, not in Homer. Extraordinarily strong - capable of feats beyond ordinary men. Excep
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: This scene doesn't work, only because it breaks the flow of the movie. I could m…
entry.content: This scene doesn't work, only because it breaks the flow of the movie. I could make this scene work with some experimental editing. Put a humming sound throughout the whole first act, it keeps getting louder and louDER AND LOUDEER then cuts to bird sounds when it gets to this scene. And pull up the exposure. Make it dream-like.

entry.title: /b/ Random: Should I Give In?
entry.content: I think my gf wants something bigger. Lately she has been wanting bigger toys and only cums with me if she’s using a vibrator. I want to give her what she wants. Am I really that small? Should I be open to bigger toys for her? I want her to be happy but also know it could be a slippery slope. Pic is me hard.

entry.title: /o/ Auto: China Introduced 4 New Cars Every Day Of 2026
entry.content: Around 650 new or refreshed cars were introduced in the first half of the year — a rate of almost four a day — according to data compiled by automotive platform Dongchedi. That contrasts with the US, where Bank of America Securities' annual Car Wars study for 2025 projected just 159 new model launches over the following four years, following a decade low of only 29 in 2024. https://www.bloomberg.com/news/arti cles/2026-07-16/china-s-insane-car- market-flooded-with-hundreds-of-new -models?srnd=ph
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto
